text: ॐṁṁ śrī paramaṭmane namaha Ṣhāceturtho dhyāyaḥ Ṣhāna-yogaḥ śrī bhagavānuvāja Ṭhīmam vivasvate yogam ॐṁṁ śrī paramaṭmane namaha Ṣhāna-yogaḥ śrī bhagavānuvāja Ṭhīmam vivasvate yogam ॐṁṁ śrī bhagavānuvāja Ṭhīmam vivasvate yogam ॐṁṁ śrī bhagavānuvāja Ṭhīmam vivasvate yogam ॐṁṁ śrī bhagavānuvāja Ṭhīmam vivasvate yogam ॐṁṁ śrī bhagavānuvāja Ṭhīmam vivasvate yogam Ṣādāt mānaṁ śrī jāṁ yāṁ paritrāṇāya sādhūnāṁ vināśāya ca duṣkṛtāṁ dharma samsthāpanārthāya sambhavāmi yuge yuge Ṣanma karma ca me divyam evam yo veti tattvatah tyaktvādeham punar janma naite māmeti sūrjuna Ṣaṁ Ṣaṁ Ṣaṁ vītaraṁ bhayakrodhā mānam yā mām upāśritā bāha vō gnānata-pasa Ṣaṁ pūtā madbhāvamāgatā yē yātā mām prapadyante Ṣaṁ Ṣaṁ tathā eva bhajaṁ yāṁ māma vārtmānu vārtante manushyāv pārtha sarvaśaḥ kāṅkshaṭaḥ karmaṇāṁ siddhim yajanta iha devataḥ kṣipraṁ hi manusheloke siddhir bhavati karmaja chātur varñyam mayaḥ śrāṣṭam gunakarmavi bhāgashah tasya kartaṁ api mām vidhyakartaṁ avyayam namaṁ karmaṇi limpanthi name karma phalespraḥ āti mām yobhija nāti karma vhirna sabadhyate evam gnyātva krṭam karma purvairapi mumokṣu bhihi kuru karma ivatas mātvam purvayi phurvataram krṭam kim karma kimakarmeti kavayopyaṭra mohitāḥ tattekarma pravakṣyāmi yajñātva mokṣya se shubhāt karmaṇohyapi bod dhavyam bod dhavyam chavi karmaṇahā ākarmaṇas ca bod dhavyam gāhanā karmaṇogati hi karmaṇya karma yafpashyēt ākarmani ca karma yāha sabudhīmān manuṣyēṣu sa yuktaḥ krṭhna karma krṭe yasyasar ve samārambhāha kāmasankal pa varjitāha njānāgni daghdha karmaṇam tamāhufpandi tam buddhāha tyaktva karma phala sangham nityatrapto nirāśraya ha karmaṇya bhipravarthopi nai vāking citta karoti sa ha nirāśīryata citta atma tyaktva sarva parigraha śārīram kevalam karma kurvanna apnoti kilbisham yadrachchālābha sāntuṣṭha ha dvandvāti to vimatsaraḥ samasiddhā vasiddhau ca krṭva pina nibadhyate gatasangasya muktasya njānā vasthi tachetasah yajñāyācara takhkarma samagraṁ pravilīyate brahmārpanam brahmāhavi brahmāgna brahmāna hūtam brahmāyvate nagantavyam brahmā karma samādhina daiva meva pare yajñam yogināf parjupāsate brahmāgnava pare yajñam yajñe naiopajuhvati śrotrādīṇīndriyāññan ye samyamāgnaṣu juhvati shabdādīn vishayānanye indriyāgnaṣu juhvati sarvāṇīndriya karmaṇi prāṇakar māni ca pare atma samyamayogāgnao juhvati jñāna dīpite drāvyayajñāstapo yajñāha yogayajñāstatha pare svādhyāyajñāna yajñāśca yatayasam shita vratā apāne juhvati prāṇam prāṇepānam tathāpare prāṇā pāna gatiruddhva prāṇā yāma parāyānā apare niyatā rāha prāṇān prāṇīśu juhvati sarvē pieti yajñe vidhā yajñākṣapita kalmasahā yajñāśśta mṛta bhujā yāntibbraṃha sanātanam nāyam lokoṣṭi yajñāsya kuto nyakurusattama evam bhau vidhā yajñāha vidhatā brahmālomukhe karmajān viddhītān sarvān evam jñātvāvimokṣya se śreyāndravyamayādh yajñāt njāna yajñāv parantapa sarvam karma khilampārtha njāne parisamāpya te tadvidhhe pranipātena pare prashnena sevaya upade kṣyantite jñānam njāni nāstattva darsinah yajñātvāna punar moham evam yāsya si pāndava yena bhūtānya se śrena drakṣya siātmanya thomai api chedasi pāpe bhya ha sarve bhya pāpakrtha mahā sarvam jñāna plavenaiva vrajīnam santarśyasi yathai dhāṁsi samidhhognihe bhasmasātkurute juna jñānāgni sarva karmaṇi bhasmasātkurute tathā nahi jñānena sadrśam pavitramiha vidyate tatsvayam yoga samsiddhaha kālenātmanivindati śraddhāvān labhate jñānam tatparasam yate ndriyaha jñānam labdhva parāṁ shāntim achirenādhi gacchati ajnashchāśraddhānascha samśayātmāvinashyati nāyam loko stina paraha nasukham samśayātmanaha yoga sannyastakar mānam jñāna san chnā samśayam ātmavantam na karmaṇi nibadhananti dhananjaya tasmādhjāna sambhūtam ratsthamjāna asinātmanaha chitvayinam samśayam yoga ātishtho tishtha bhārata oṁ tatsaditi śrīmadbhāgavadgītāsu upaneśratsu brahmavidhyāyā yoga śāstra śikrṣṇārjuna samvāde njāna yoga nāmā cheturtho dhyāya

segments.text: ॐṁṁ śrī paramaṭmane namaha Ṣhāceturtho dhyāyaḥ Ṣhāna-yogaḥ śrī bhagavānuvāja Ṭhīmam vivasvate yogam
ॐṁṁ śrī paramaṭmane namaha Ṣhāna-yogaḥ śrī bhagavānuvāja Ṭhīmam vivasvate yogam
ॐṁṁ śrī bhagavānuvāja Ṭhīmam vivasvate yogam
ॐṁṁ śrī bhagavānuvāja Ṭhīmam vivasvate yogam
ॐṁṁ śrī bhagavānuvāja Ṭhīmam vivasvate yogam
ॐṁṁ śrī bhagavānuvāja Ṭhīmam vivasvate yogam
Ṣādāt mānaṁ śrī jāṁ yāṁ paritrāṇāya sādhūnāṁ vināśāya ca duṣkṛtāṁ dharma samsthāpanārthāya sambhavāmi yuge yuge
Ṣanma karma ca me divyam evam yo veti tattvatah tyaktvādeham punar janma naite māmeti sūrjuna
Ṣaṁ Ṣaṁ Ṣaṁ vītaraṁ bhayakrodhā mānam yā mām upāśritā bāha vō gnānata-pasa
Ṣaṁ pūtā madbhāvamāgatā yē yātā mām prapadyante
Ṣaṁ Ṣaṁ tathā eva bhajaṁ yāṁ māma vārtmānu vārtante
manushyāv pārtha sarvaśaḥ kāṅkshaṭaḥ karmaṇāṁ siddhim
yajanta iha devataḥ kṣipraṁ hi manusheloke
siddhir bhavati karmaja chātur varñyam mayaḥ śrāṣṭam
gunakarmavi bhāgashah tasya kartaṁ api mām
vidhyakartaṁ avyayam namaṁ karmaṇi limpanthi
name karma phalespraḥ āti mām yobhija nāti
karma vhirna sabadhyate evam gnyātva krṭam karma
purvairapi mumokṣu bhihi kuru karma ivatas mātvam
purvayi phurvataram krṭam kim karma kimakarmeti
kavayopyaṭra mohitāḥ tattekarma pravakṣyāmi
yajñātva mokṣya se shubhāt
karmaṇohyapi bod dhavyam bod dhavyam chavi karmaṇahā
ākarmaṇas ca bod dhavyam gāhanā karmaṇogati hi
karmaṇya karma yafpashyēt
ākarmani ca karma yāha sabudhīmān manuṣyēṣu
sa yuktaḥ krṭhna karma krṭe yasyasar ve samārambhāha
kāmasankal pa varjitāha njānāgni daghdha karmaṇam
tamāhufpandi tam buddhāha
tyaktva karma phala sangham nityatrapto nirāśraya ha
karmaṇya bhipravarthopi nai vāking citta karoti sa ha
nirāśīryata citta atma tyaktva sarva parigraha
śārīram kevalam karma kurvanna apnoti kilbisham
yadrachchālābha sāntuṣṭha ha
dvandvāti to vimatsaraḥ samasiddhā vasiddhau ca
krṭva pina nibadhyate gatasangasya muktasya
njānā vasthi tachetasah yajñāyācara takhkarma
samagraṁ pravilīyate brahmārpanam brahmāhavi
brahmāgna brahmāna hūtam brahmāyvate nagantavyam
brahmā karma samādhina daiva meva pare yajñam
yogināf parjupāsate brahmāgnava pare yajñam
yajñe naiopajuhvati śrotrādīṇīndriyāññan ye
samyamāgnaṣu juhvati shabdādīn vishayānanye
indriyāgnaṣu juhvati sarvāṇīndriya karmaṇi
prāṇakar māni ca pare atma samyamayogāgnao
juhvati jñāna dīpite drāvyayajñāstapo yajñāha
yogayajñāstatha pare svādhyāyajñāna yajñāśca
yatayasam shita vratā apāne juhvati prāṇam
prāṇepānam tathāpare prāṇā pāna gatiruddhva
prāṇā yāma parāyānā apare niyatā rāha
prāṇān prāṇīśu juhvati sarvē pieti yajñe vidhā
yajñākṣapita kalmasahā yajñāśśta mṛta bhujā
yāntibbraṃha sanātanam nāyam lokoṣṭi yajñāsya
kuto nyakurusattama evam bhau vidhā yajñāha
vidhatā brahmālomukhe karmajān viddhītān sarvān
evam jñātvāvimokṣya se śreyāndravyamayādh yajñāt
njāna yajñāv parantapa sarvam karma khilampārtha
njāne parisamāpya te tadvidhhe pranipātena
pare prashnena sevaya upade kṣyantite jñānam
njāni nāstattva darsinah yajñātvāna punar moham
evam yāsya si pāndava yena bhūtānya se śrena
drakṣya siātmanya thomai api chedasi pāpe bhya ha
sarve bhya pāpakrtha mahā sarvam jñāna plavenaiva
vrajīnam santarśyasi yathai dhāṁsi samidhhognihe
bhasmasātkurute juna jñānāgni sarva karmaṇi
bhasmasātkurute tathā nahi jñānena sadrśam
pavitramiha vidyate tatsvayam yoga samsiddhaha
kālenātmanivindati śraddhāvān labhate jñānam
tatparasam yate ndriyaha jñānam labdhva parāṁ shāntim
achirenādhi gacchati ajnashchāśraddhānascha
samśayātmāvinashyati nāyam loko stina paraha
nasukham samśayātmanaha yoga sannyastakar mānam
jñāna san chnā samśayam ātmavantam na karmaṇi
nibadhananti dhananjaya tasmādhjāna sambhūtam
ratsthamjāna asinātmanaha chitvayinam samśayam yoga
ātishtho tishtha bhārata oṁ tatsaditi
śrīmadbhāgavadgītāsu upaneśratsu brahmavidhyāyā
yoga śāstra śikrṣṇārjuna samvāde
njāna yoga nāmā cheturtho dhyāya
